nasb.text: When the cherubim stood still, the wheels would stand still; and when they rose up, the wheels would rise with them, for the spirit of the living beings was in them.

esv.text: When they stood still, these stood still, and when they mounted up, these mounted up with them, for the spirit of the living creatures was in them.

cnv.text: 他們站著不動，輪子也不動；他們升起的時候，輪子也與他們一同上升，因為活物的靈是在輪子裡面。

ccb.text: 基路伯天使停住，轮子也随之停住；基路伯天使上升，轮子也随之上升。因为活物的灵在轮子中。
